requirement_topic.en: BNM Conformity Assessment Scope for EV Chargers
requirement_topic.zh: BNM电动汽车充电桩合格评定适用范围
requirement_topic.zht: BNM電動汽車充電樁合格評定適用範圍

summary.en: BNM (Bureau des Normes de Madagascar) is the national standardization body for Madagascar, responsible for adopting and publishing national standards and coordinating conformity assessment. BNM adopts IEC standards as the technical basis for electrical equipment conformity in Madagascar. Imported electrical equipment, including EV chargers, must conform to applicable BNM-adopted IEC standards and satisfy ORE regulatory requirements for grid-connected electrical installations. A formal BNM product certification or Certificate of Conformity route for EV chargers specifically could not be confirmed from official sources as of 2026-06-14; exporters should verify the current BNM conformity assessment procedure, applicable IEC standard references, HS code classification, and ORE requirements for their specific product and project before shipment. Documentation for BNM and ORE submissions is in French.
summary.zh: BNM（马达加斯加标准局）是马达加斯加国家标准化机构，负责采纳和发布国家标准并协调合格评定工作。BNM以IEC标准为马达加斯加电气设备合格评定的技术基础。进口电气设备（包括电动汽车充电桩）须符合BNM采纳的适用IEC标准，并满足ORE对并网电气安装的监管要求。截至2026年6月14日，未能从官方来源确认针对电动汽车充电桩的BNM产品认证或合格证书（CoC）正式路径；出口商在出货前应向BNM或ORE核实其具体产品和项目的现行合格评定程序、适用IEC标准参考、HS编码分类及ORE要求。BNM和ORE文件提交须使用法语。
summary.zht: BNM（馬達加斯加標準局）是馬達加斯加國家標準化機構，負責採納和發布國家標準並協調合格評定工作。BNM以IEC標準為馬達加斯加電氣設備合格評定的技術基礎。進口電氣設備（包括電動汽車充電樁）須符合BNM採納的適用IEC標準，並滿足ORE對併網電氣安裝的監管要求。截至2026年6月14日，未能從官方來源確認針對電動汽車充電樁的BNM產品認證或合格證書（CoC）正式路徑；出口商在出貨前應向BNM或ORE核實其具體產品和項目的現行合格評定程序、適用IEC標準參考、HS編碼分類及ORE要求。BNM和ORE文件提交須使用法語。

standards_or_laws: BNM (Bureau des Normes de Madagascar) — national standards adoption and conformity assessment
ORE (Office de Régulation de l'Electricité) — licensing and project approval for grid-connected electrical installations
JIRAMA (Jiro sy Rano Malagasy) — utility grid-connection technical requirements
IEC 61851-1:2017, IEC 61851-23:2023, IEC 62196 — adopted IEC standards applicable to EV chargers

summary.en: China-market chargers are commonly documented against GB/T 18487.1-2023 for conductive charging system requirements and GB/T 20234 connector standards, with China Compulsory Certification (CCC) applying where the charger falls within CCC scope. China CCC or GB/T test evidence may support engineering reference during a BNM or ORE conformity review, but it does not by itself establish Madagascar conformity status or ORE project approval. Chinese-language documentation must be translated to French for BNM/ORE regulatory submissions.
summary.zh: 中国市场充电桩通常依据GB/T 18487.1-2023传导充电系统要求及GB/T 20234连接器标准准备文件；如充电桩属于CCC适用范围，则须取得中国强制认证（CCC）。中国CCC或GB/T测试证据可在BNM或ORE合格评定审查过程中作为工程参考，但其本身不能证明马达加斯加合格评定状态或ORE项目审批。向BNM/ORE监管机构提交的中文文件须翻译为法语。
summary.zht: 中國市場充電樁通常依據GB/T 18487.1-2023傳導充電系統要求及GB/T 20234連接器標準準備文件；如充電樁屬於CCC適用範圍，則須取得中國強制認證（CCC）。中國CCC或GB/T測試證據可在BNM或ORE合格評定審查過程中作為工程參考，但其本身不能證明馬達加斯加合格評定狀態或ORE項目審批。向BNM/ORE監管機構提交的中文文件須翻譯為法語。

standards_or_laws: China CCC (3C) mandatory certification where in scope

gap.en: Exporters should: (1) confirm the BNM conformity assessment route and ORE project approval procedure with BNM or a Madagascar-accredited conformity body for the specific product HS code and charger type; (2) prepare French-language technical documentation including IEC safety and EMC reports, product manuals, installation instructions, and labelling; (3) address IEC 62196 connector conformity, IEC 61851 safety, IEC 61000 EMC, and ORE/JIRAMA grid-connection requirements separately; (4) verify import duties, HS code classification, and customs requirements with the Madagascar importer and customs authority before shipment. A standalone China CCC certificate does not establish Madagascar BNM conformity or ORE approval.
gap.zh: 出口商应：(1) 向BNM或马达加斯加认可合格评定机构确认具体产品HS编码和充电桩类型的BNM合格评定路径及ORE项目审批程序；(2) 准备法语技术文件，包括IEC安全和EMC报告、产品手册、安装说明及标签；(3) 分别处理IEC 62196接口合格评定、IEC 61851安全、IEC 61000 EMC及ORE/JIRAMA并网要求；(4) 在出货前与马达加斯加进口商和海关当局核实进口关税、HS编码分类及海关要求。单独的中国CCC证书不能证明马达加斯加BNM合格评定状态或ORE审批。
gap.zht: 出口商應：(1) 向BNM或馬達加斯加認可合格評定機構確認具體產品HS編碼和充電樁類型的BNM合格評定路徑及ORE項目審批程序；(2) 準備法語技術文件，包括IEC安全和EMC報告、產品手冊、安裝說明及標籤；(3) 分別處理IEC 62196接口合格評定、IEC 61851安全、IEC 61000 EMC及ORE/JIRAMA併網要求；(4) 在出貨前與馬達加斯加進口商和海關當局核實進口關稅、HS編碼分類及海關要求。單獨的中國CCC證書不能證明馬達加斯加BNM合格評定狀態或ORE審批。

mandatory_status.target: Conditional — BNM conformity applies to electrical equipment imports in scope under adopted IEC standards; exact EV charger BNM conformity route should be verified with BNM or an accredited body for the specific product HS code; ORE and JIRAMA approval is mandatory for grid-connected installations; French-language documentation is required
mandatory_status.cn: Mandatory or recommended depending on China CCC scope; GB/T evidence and CCC certification are not substitutes for BNM conformity or ORE approval; Chinese-language documentation requires French translation for Madagascar regulatory submissions

source.publisher: BNM — Bureau des Normes de Madagascar

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Do not claim automatic Madagascar market access from China CCC or GB/T reports alone. Verify the BNM conformity route for the specific product HS code, prepare French-language IEC-based technical documentation, and address ORE and JIRAMA grid-connection approval separately before shipment or installation.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 不应仅凭中国CCC或GB/T报告宣称自动满足马达加斯加市场准入。出货或安装前，须核实具体产品HS编码的BNM合格评定路径，准备基于IEC的法语技术文件，并分别处理ORE和JIRAMA并网批准事宜。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 不應僅憑中國CCC或GB/T報告宣稱自動滿足馬達加斯加市場准入。出貨或安裝前，須核實具體產品HS編碼的BNM合格評定路徑，準備基於IEC的法語技術文件，並分別處理ORE和JIRAMA併網批准事宜。

requirement_topic.en: Madagascar EV Market Context — Nascent Market and Deployment Constraints
requirement_topic.zh: 马达加斯加电动汽车市场背景——初级市场与部署制约
requirement_topic.zht: 馬達加斯加電動汽車市場背景——初級市場與部署制約

summary.en: Madagascar's EV market is extremely nascent as of 2026-06-14. Domestic EV penetration is near zero; the vehicle fleet is dominated by used imports running on petrol and diesel. National electrification rate is approximately 30% overall and significantly lower in rural areas, creating fundamental infrastructure constraints for EV charging deployment outside of a small number of urban centres (primarily Antananarivo). JIRAMA's grid faces chronic underfunding, aging infrastructure, and frequent outages. Madagascar's EV charging opportunity exists mainly in the context of high-volume-throughput commercial projects (hotels, donor-funded transport projects, port logistics) where reliable grid supply can be guaranteed or supplemented with solar/battery backup. Exporters should not assume a general consumer EV charging market exists; each deployment opportunity must be assessed on a case-by-case basis for grid viability, EV vehicle fleet availability, and regulatory pathway.
summary.zh: 截至2026年6月14日，马达加斯加电动汽车市场极为初级。国内电动汽车保有量几乎为零；车辆保有量以使用汽油和柴油的二手进口车为主。全国电气化率约为30%，农村地区更低，这给少数城市中心（主要是塔那那利佛）以外的电动汽车充电部署造成了根本性的基础设施制约。JIRAMA电网长期面临资金不足、基础设施老化和频繁停电问题。马达加斯加的电动汽车充电机遇主要存在于高通量商业项目背景下（酒店、捐助资助的交通项目、港口物流），这些场所可保证或通过太阳能/电池备用电源补充可靠供电。出口商不应假设存在普通消费者电动汽车充电市场；每个部署机会须就电网可行性、电动汽车车队可用性和监管路径逐一评估。
summary.zht: 截至2026年6月14日，馬達加斯加電動汽車市場極為初級。國內電動汽車保有量幾乎為零；車輛保有量以使用汽油和柴油的二手進口車為主。全國電氣化率約為30%，農村地區更低，這給少數城市中心（主要是塔那那利佛）以外的電動汽車充電部署造成了根本性的基礎設施制約。JIRAMA電網長期面臨資金不足、基礎設施老化和頻繁停電問題。馬達加斯加的電動汽車充電機遇主要存在於高通量商業項目背景下（酒店、捐助資助的交通項目、港口物流），這些場所可保證或通過太陽能/電池備用電源補充可靠供電。出口商不應假設存在普通消費者電動汽車充電市場；每個部署機會須就電網可行性、電動汽車車隊可用性和監管路徑逐一評估。

standards_or_laws: JIRAMA — national electricity utility infrastructure and electrification coverage
Madagascar National Development Plan — electrification and infrastructure goals
IEA / World Bank electrification data for Madagascar (informational reference)

summary.en: China's national EV infrastructure expansion is governed by the New Energy Vehicle Industry Development Plan (2021–2035) and benefits from near-universal urban grid electrification and a mature domestic EV market. This context is fundamentally different from Madagascar's situation. Chinese manufacturers accustomed to China's dense urban charging networks and reliable grid should not extrapolate Chinese deployment assumptions to Madagascar; grid reliability, EV vehicle fleet density, consumer demand, and commercial viability must each be validated independently for specific Madagascar locations.
summary.zh: 中国国家电动汽车基础设施扩张由《新能源汽车产业发展规划（2021—2035年）》管理，受益于近乎全面覆盖的城市电网电气化和成熟的国内电动汽车市场。这一背景与马达加斯加的情况有根本性差异。习惯于中国密集城市充电网络和可靠电网的中国制造商，不应将中国部署经验外推至马达加斯加；须针对马达加斯加具体地点分别验证电网可靠性、电动汽车车队密度、消费者需求和商业可行性。
summary.zht: 中國國家電動汽車基礎設施擴張由《新能源汽車產業發展規劃（2021—2035年）》管理，受益於近乎全面覆蓋的城市電網電氣化和成熟的國內電動汽車市場。這一背景與馬達加斯加的情況有根本性差異。習慣於中國密集城市充電網絡和可靠電網的中國製造商，不應將中國部署經驗外推至馬達加斯加；須針對馬達加斯加具體地點分別驗證電網可靠性、電動汽車車隊密度、消費者需求和商業可行性。

standards_or_laws: New Energy Vehicle Industry Development Plan 2021–2035 (China)
China National Development and Reform Commission charging-station requirements

gap.en: Madagascar's nascent EV market and constrained grid are the primary deployment risks that technical compliance alone cannot resolve. Exporters should: (1) identify a specific project with confirmed EV vehicle fleet, reliable grid supply or backup power, and a local partner with ORE/JIRAMA relationships; (2) assess whether the project site has adequate JIRAMA supply capacity and electrification; (3) size the charger for actual demand rather than peak-infrastructure specifications; (4) plan for charger firmware resilience to grid instability; (5) engage a local partner with French-language regulatory capability for BNM and ORE submissions. Technical compliance with IEC 61851, IEC 62196, and BNM is necessary but not sufficient — commercial and grid-viability due diligence is equally essential.
gap.zh: 马达加斯加初级电动汽车市场和受限电网是仅靠技术合规无法解决的主要部署风险。出口商应：(1) 确定具有已确认电动汽车车队、可靠供电或备用电源，以及具备ORE/JIRAMA关系的本地合作伙伴的具体项目；(2) 评估项目地点是否具有足够的JIRAMA供电容量和电气化条件；(3) 根据实际需求而非峰值基础设施规格确定充电桩规模；(4) 规划充电桩固件对电网不稳定性的韧性；(5) 与具备法语监管能力的本地合作伙伴合作，负责BNM和ORE的文件提交。符合IEC 61851、IEC 62196和BNM的技术合规是必要条件但不充分——商业和电网可行性尽职调查同样至关重要。
gap.zht: 馬達加斯加初級電動汽車市場和受限電網是僅靠技術合規無法解決的主要部署風險。出口商應：(1) 確定具有已確認電動汽車車隊、可靠供電或備用電源，以及具備ORE/JIRAMA關係的本地合作夥伴的具體項目；(2) 評估項目地點是否具有足夠的JIRAMA供電容量和電氣化條件；(3) 根據實際需求而非峰值基礎設施規格確定充電樁規模；(4) 規劃充電樁固件對電網不穩定性的韌性；(5) 與具備法語監管能力的本地合作夥伴合作，負責BNM和ORE的文件提交。符合IEC 61851、IEC 62196和BNM的技術合規是必要條件但不充分——商業和電網可行性盡職調查同樣至關重要。

mandatory_status.target: Market context — not itself a mandatory product standard; technical and conformity requirements under BNM, ORE, and JIRAMA remain in force independently; grid viability and commercial due diligence are essential prerequisites for any deployment
mandatory_status.cn: Market context only — China EV infrastructure scale and grid reliability do not translate to Madagascar deployment assumptions

source.publisher: JIRAMA — Jiro sy Rano Malagasy (Madagascar national electricity and water utility)

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Madagascar's EV charging market is extremely nascent. Technical compliance with IEC standards and BNM/ORE requirements is necessary but insufficient for viable deployment. Assess grid reliability, EV fleet availability, and commercial conditions site-by-site. Do not extrapolate Chinese market deployment assumptions to Madagascar.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 马达加斯加电动汽车充电市场极为初级。符合IEC标准和BNM/ORE要求的技术合规是必要条件，但不足以保证部署可行。须逐场地评估电网可靠性、电动汽车车队可用性和商业条件。不应将中国市场部署经验外推至马达加斯加。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 馬達加斯加電動汽車充電市場極為初級。符合IEC標準和BNM/ORE要求的技術合規是必要條件，但不足以保證部署可行。須逐場地評估電網可靠性、電動汽車車隊可用性和商業條件。不應將中國市場部署經驗外推至馬達加斯加。
